channel.title: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
Hi community!
First of all, sorry for my english in this topic😅
I've installed Yoast SEO plugin and @frontity/yoast package, but in homepage i can't see meta tags. In other pages intead i can see all meta tags without problems.
I have changed home page from "Your latest posts" to "A static page" and it seems that che page does not exit: in WP theme I can reach it, but in frontity project i receive 404 error.
Can anyone give me a hand? Thanks!

item.title: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage
item.dc:creator: fishoutdolanout
item.description:
Actually I figured it out - there is a section in @frontity/yoast - API Reference for adding Yoast to archive pages.

Add their suggested snippet of code to functions.php and Yoast works on the home page. I assume the home page counts as an archive page, which I didn’t know.

Read full topic
item.source: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage

item.title: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage
item.dc:creator: fishoutdolanout
item.description:
I also have this issue, so bumping in the hope someone might have a suggestion

Read full topic
item.source: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage

item.title: Yoast Plugin and @frontity/yoast doesn't work on homepage
item.dc:creator: simone.tissi
item.description:
Hi community!

First of all, sorry for my english in this topic😅

I’ve installed Yoast SEO plugin and @frontity/yoast package, but in homepage i can’t see meta tags. In other pages intead i can see all meta tags without problems.

I have changed home page from “Your latest posts” to “A static page” and it seems that che page does not exit: in WP theme I can reach it, but in frontity project i receive 404 error.

Can anyone give me a hand?
Thanks!

Read full topic
